name: Draconic Gift
description: The bond you share with your drake creates a connection to dragonkind, granting you understanding and empowering your presence. You gain the following benefits: Thaumaturgy. You learn the thaumaturgy cantrip, which is a ranger spell for you. Tongue of Dragons. You learn to speak, read, and write Draconic or one other language of your choice.

mechanics.choice_description: one other language of your choice
